faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth problem in my Rosedale home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include small irregular holes in wool clothing, cashmere, or upholstery; silky tubes or cases in closet corners; and small beige or gold-colored moths flying near wardrobes. You may also notice larvae (small white caterpillars) on fabrics or webbing in stored clothing. Our Rosedale technicians provide free inspections to confirm infestations.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth treatment cost in Rosedale?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control in Rosedale typically ranges from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of infestation, size of your home, and number of affected areas. A single-room treatment starts around $550, while whole-house infestations in larger Rosedale properties require more extensive treatment. We provide free estimates with transparent pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: Are clothes moth treatments safe for my fabrics and family?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use fabric-safe products specifically formulated for clothes moth control that won't damage your clothing, carpets, or upholstery. Our treatments are safe for children and pets once dried, and we provide detailed preparation instructions to ensure both effectiveness and safety throughout your Rosedale home.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat my Rosedale home for clothes moths?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for most Rosedale locations. Treatment typically takes 1-3 hours depending on your home's size and infestation extent. Follow-up visits may be scheduled 2-4 weeks later to ensure complete elimination, as clothes moth life cycles require monitoring to prevent re-infestation.
